result.finding: No application XML configuration files detected. The application uses Spring Boot's annotation-based @Configuration classes and auto-configuration exclusively. The only XML file is pom.xml (Maven build descriptor). No Spring context XML files, Hibernate .hbm.xml mappings, web.xml, persistence.xml, log4j.xml, or MyBatis mapper XML files are present.
evidence: Only 1 XML file found in project: pom.xml (Maven build descriptor)
No Spring applicationContext.xml, spring-*.xml, or beans.xml found
No Hibernate hibernate.cfg.xml or .hbm.xml entity mapping files found
No web.xml deployment descriptor found (Spring Boot uses embedded Tomcat with annotation config)
No persistence.xml found (Spring Boot auto-configures JPA via application.properties)
No log4j.xml or logback.xml found (Spring Boot uses logback with default configuration)
Spring Boot 3.3 uses @SpringBootApplication and @Configuration annotations for all configuration
values: XML configuration type: None (annotation-based Spring Boot)
Build XML: pom.xml (Maven, not an application config)
Configuration approach: Spring Boot auto-configuration + application.properties
